The additional dégâts is [[/r 1d8]] for each point spent in this way. You can't deal more than [[/r 2d8]] additional dégâts per hit in this way.

You can only spend a number of point de Forces in this way equal to your bonus de maîtrise. You regain the ability to do so when you complete a repos long.

Carbine Supremacy.name: Suprématie de la carabine
Carbine Supremacy.description:
You've specialized your combat training with carbine weapons. You gain the following benefits while wielding any of these weapons, if you are proficient with it:

  • You gain a +1 bonus to the weapon's attack rolls.
  • Whenever you have avantage on an attack roll and hit and the lower of the two [[/r d20]] rolls would also hit (or a creature has disavantage on a jet de sauvegarde and the higher of the two d20s would also fail), and la cible is no more than one size larger than you (your size or smaller if your weapon has the light property), it must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or gain 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.
  • You can wield this weapon in one hand. When you do so, you treat the weapon as if it would have the strength 11 property. If the weapon already has the strength property, its strength number increases by one step (from 11 to 13, 13 to 15, 15 to 17, 17 to 19, or 19 to 21). While wielding the weapon in one hand, you can't attack a target beyond the weapon's normal range.
  • When you take the Attack action, vous pouvez choisir to forgo one or more attacks to startle. For each attack you forgo, you expend 1 ammunition and choose a creature that is no more than one size larger than you (your size or smaller if your weapon has the light property) and is within your weapon's normal range. The creature must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or become shocked jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. If you could already startle, instead you can do so as your action bonus.

Improved Force-Sensitive.name: Sensibilité à la force améliorée
Improved Force-Sensitive.description: Vous connaissez un pouvoir de la Force à volonté. De plus, vous connaissez un pouvoir de la Force de 3e niveau, que vous pouvez lancer une fois par repos. Votre capacité de lancement de force est la Sagesse ou le Charisme (selon l'alignement du pouvoir).

Quick-Fingered.name: Aux doigts rapides
Quick-Fingered.description:
Your nimble fingers and agility let you perform sleight of hand. You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase your Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • You gain maîtrise in the Escamotage skill. If you are already proficient in it, you instead gain expertise in it.
  • As a action bonus, you can make a Dexterity (Escamotage) check to plant something on someone else, conceal an object on a creature, lift a purse, or take something from a pocket.

War Caster.name: Lanceur de guerre
War Caster.description:
You've practiced casting powers in the midst of combat, learning techniques that grant you the following benefits:

  • You have avantage on Constitution jet de sauvegardes that you make to maintain your concentration on a power when you take dégâts.
  • Once per round, when a hostile creature provokes an attaque d'opportunité from you, you can use your réaction to cast a power at la créature, rather than making an attaque d'opportunité. The power must have a casting time of 1 action and must target only cette créature.

Cunning Forcecaster.name: Lanceur de force rusé
Cunning Forcecaster.description:
Vous avez découvert une voie astucieuse pour votre étude de la Force. Choisissez-en un parmi la Sagesse ou le Charisme. Vous bénéficiez des avantages suivants :

  • Augmentez votre score d'Intelligence de 1, jusqu'à un maximum de 20.
  • Vous pouvez utiliser l'Intelligence à la place de la capacité choisie comme capacité de lancement forcé.
  • Vous pouvez ajouter de l'Intelligence à la place de la capacité choisie lors de la détermination de votre point maximum de Forces.

Mobile.name: Mobile
Mobile.description:
You are exceptionally speedy and agile. You gain the following benefits:

  • Your speed increases by 10 mètres.
  • When you use the Dash action, difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement on that turn.
  • When you make a attaque au corps à corps against a creature, you don't provoke attaque d'opportunités from cette créature for the rest of the turn, whether you hit or not.

Supreme Durability.name: Durabilité suprême
Supreme Durability.description:
Vous faites preuve d’une étonnante résilience physique et mentale. Vous bénéficiez des avantages suivants :

  • Augmentez votre score de Force, de Constitution, de Sagesse ou de Charisme de 1, jusqu'à un maximum de 20.
  • Chaque fois que vous avez l'avantage sur un jet de sauvegarde en utilisant la Force, la Constitution, la Sagesse ou le Charisme, vous pouvez relancer un des dés une fois.

Carbine Focus.name: Mise au point de la carabine
Carbine Focus.description:
You've focused your combat training on carbine weapons. You gain the following benefits while wielding any of these weapons, if you are proficient with it:

  • You gain a +1 bonus to the weapon's jet de dégâtss.
  • When you score a critical hit with the weapon, the next attack roll la cible makes before the start of your next turn has disavantage.
  • When you take the Attack action, vous pouvez choisir to forgo one or more attacks to startle. For each attack you forgo, you expend 1 ammunition and choose a creature that is no more than one size larger than you (your size or smaller if your weapon has the light property) and is within your weapon's normal range. The creature must succeed on a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or become shocked jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

Haggler.name: Marchandeur
Haggler.description:
Vos compétences en troc vous ont accordé les avantages suivants :

  • Augmentez votre score de Charisme de 1 jusqu'à un maximum de 20.
  • Vous avez un avantage sur les tests de Charisme (Persuasion) et de Charisme (Tromperie) lorsque vous tentez de troquer ou commerce.
  • Vous êtes toujours au courant de la valeur monétaire actuelle de tout objet non amélioré ou amélioré commun. Chaque fois que vous identifiez un objet, vous obtenez une estimation approximative de sa valeur monétaire actuelle.

Animal Handler.name: Manieur d'animaux
Animal Handler.description:
You master the techniques needed to train and handle animals. You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase your Wisdom score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • You gain maîtrise in the Dressage skill. If you are already proficient in it, you instead gain expertise in it.
  • You can use a action bonus on your turn to command one friendly beast within 60 mètres of you that can hear you and that isn't currently following the command of someone else. You decide now what action the beast will take and where it will move during its next turn, or you issue a general command that lasts pendant 1 minute, such as to guard a particular area.

Chemical Buffer.name: Tampon chimique
Chemical Buffer.description:
You're able to neutralize caustic chemicals, mitigating their worst effects. You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase your Dexterity, Constitution, or Intelligence score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • You cannot be disintegrated, and you ignore the first corroded niveau you receive.
  • You have avantage on jet de sauvegardes made to avoid acid dégâts.

Weapon Supremacist.name: Suprémaciste des armes
Weapon Supremacist.description:
Vous maîtrisez un type d'arme particulier. Choisissez l’une des options suprémacistes en matière d’armes, détaillées plus loin dans ce chapitre. Vous pouvez réaliser cet exploit plusieurs fois.

  • @UUID[Compendium.sw5e.feats.Item.PRt3Mf8aQAJuSEW3]{Suprématie de la lame}
  • @UUID[Compendium.sw5e.feats.Item.X815vrMWDsxTsTxg]{Suprématie de la carabine}

Casting Specialist.name: Spécialiste du casting
Casting Specialist.description:
Choose one from force- or tech-casting. You've mastered your chosen casting type, gaining the following benefits:

  • You gain a +1 bonus to your force or tech sauvegarde DD and your force or tech attack modificateur.
  • Une fois par tour, when you cast a power that requires an attack roll or jet de sauvegarde, you can have avantage on one attack roll, or you can force une créature affected by the power to have avantage or disavantage on the jet de sauvegarde (your choice). Once you've used this feature on a power, you can't affect that power again until you complete a short or repos long. Once you've used this feature on a creature, you can't do so again until you complete a short or repos long.
  • Une fois par tour, when you cast a power that doesn't require an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde, but requires a die roll, vous pouvez choisir the maximum or minimum on the die (your choice). If the power requires rolling multiple dice, you can only affect a number of them equal to half your bonus de maîtrise (rounded up) in this way. Once you've used this feature on a power, you can't affect that power again until you complete a short or repos long.

You can select this feat twice. Each time you do so, you must choose a different casting type.

Entertainer.name: Artiste
Entertainer.description:
You have a natural gift for performing. Select one musical instrument. You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase an score de caractéristique de votre choix by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • You gain maîtrise in the chosen musical instrument. If you are already proficient with it, you instead gain expertise with it.
  • While playing your chosen musical instrument, you can always readily read the emotions of those paying attention to you. During this time, and for up to one minute after completing, you have avantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks to read the emotions of those you performed for.

You can take this feat multiple times. Each time you do so, you must choose a different musical instrument.

Actor.name: Acteur
Actor.description:
Skilled at mimicry and dramatics, you gain the following benefits:

  • Increase your Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • You have avantage on Charisma (Deception) and Charisma (Performance) checks when trying to pass yourpersonnelle off as a different person.
  • You can mimic the speech of another person or the sounds made by other creatures. You must have heard the person speaking, or heard la créature make the sound, for at least 1 minute. A successful Wisdom (Insight) check contested by your Charisma (Deception) check allows a listener to determine that the effect is faked.

Combat Caster.name: Lanceur de combat
Combat Caster.description:
You've practiced making your powers more difficult to avoid, learning techniques that grant you the following benefits:

  • When a creature rolls a 1 on the [[/r d20]] roll of a jet de sauvegarde against a power you cast that deals dégâts, they instead take the highest number possible for the dégâts die.
  • You learn one at-will power that requires a jet de sauvegarde. Your casting ability for this at-will power depends on the power list you chose from: Wisdom or Charisma (depending on power alignment) for pouvoir de la Forces or Intelligence for pouvoir techniques.

Multiclass Improvement.name: Amélioration multiclasse
Multiclass Improvement.description:
Vous avez appris à mélanger les compétences de vos différentes classes. Choisissez deux des options d'amélioration multiclasse, détaillées plus loin dans ce chapitre. Vous pouvez réaliser cet exploit plusieurs fois.

Trip Weapon Focus.name: Focus sur les armes de déclenchement
Trip Weapon Focus.description:
You've focused your combat training on trip weapons. You gain the following benefits while wielding any of these weapons, if you are proficient with it:

  • You gain a +1 bonus to the weapon's jet de dégâtss.
  • When you score a critical hit with the weapon, the next attack roll made against la cible before the start of your next turn has avantage.
  • When you take the Attack action, vous pouvez choisir to forgo one or more attacks to interrupt. For each attack you forgo, une créature within your reach gains no benefit to classe d'armure from its shield until the end of its next turn.

Augmented Cyborg.name: Cyborg augmenté
Augmented Cyborg.description:
You've experimented with cybernetic augmentations, granting the following benefits:

  • Increase an score de caractéristique de votre choix by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • Choose one cybernetic augmentation of standard rarity from Appendix A. That augmentation is installed and doesn't count against the maximum cybernetic augmentations you can support, but it does count towards your total cybernetics augmentations as shown in the Cybernetic Augmentations Side Effects table in Chapter 7.

Tiny Terror.name: Petite terreur
Tiny Terror.description:
Despite falling below knee height of other species, your size has less impact on your strength and virility. You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase your Strength score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • Your speed increases by 5 mètres.
  • You lose the Pintsized special trait, and you are no longer limited to +3 when determining your bonus to attack and jet de dégâtss for attaque d'armes using Strength due to the Puny special trait.
  • You gain the Undersized special trait: Undersized. Your small stature makes it hard for you to wield bigger weapons. You can't use heavy shields or martial weapons with the two-handed property unless it has the light property, and if a martial weapon has the versatile property, you can only wield it in two-hands.

Berserker.name: Berserker
Berserker.description:
On your turn, you can enter a rage as a action bonus if you aren't wearing heavy armor.

While raging, you gain the following benefits:

  • You have avantage on test de Forces and Strength jet de sauvegardes.
  • When you make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps using Strength, you gain a +2 bonus to the jet de dégâts.
  • You have resistance to kinetic and energy dégâts.

If you are able to cast powers, you can't cast them or concentrate on them while raging.

Your rage lasts pendant 1 minute. It ends early if you are knocked inconscient, you don heavy armor, or if your turn ends and you haven't taken a hostile action or taken dégâts since your last turn. You can also end your rage on your turn as a action bonus.

You can use this feature once. You gain an additional use at niveau 11. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

Unnatural Resilience.name: Résilience contre nature
Unnatural Resilience.description:
You have the fortitude often attributed to gods, granting the following benefits:

  • You gain maîtrise in Constitution jet de sauvegardes. If you are already proficient in them, you instead gain expertise in them.
  • Enhanced effects, such as powers or medpacs, that would restore points de vie to you can't restore an amount less than half your niveau + your Constitution modificateur. If this amount would exceed that maximum amount of points de vie that effect could restore, you instead take that effect's maximum.
  • Vous pouvez ajouter your Constitution modificateur to death jet de sauvegardes you make.

Snappy Interjection.name: Interjection vive
Snappy Interjection.description:
You've mastered a quick tongue to aid your allies. You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase your Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • Once per short or repos long, when an ally makes an attack roll, an test de caractéristique or a jet de sauvegarde, you can spend your réaction to give them avantage on the roll.

Savage Shorty.name: Shorty sauvage
Savage Shorty.description:
Despite being short of stature, your size has no impact on your strength and virility. You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase your Strength score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • Your speed increases by 5 mètres.
  • You lose the Undersized special trait.

Total Reconstruction.name: Reconstruction totale
Total Reconstruction.description:
You are more machine than man. While repaired in a similar configuration as your own species, you are subject to the following changes:

  • Increase an score de caractéristique de votre choix by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • Choose one class of droid (class I-V or tracker). You count as the chosen creature type in addition to your other type.
  • You are resistant to necrotic and poison dégâts, and are immune to poison and disease.
  • You do not need to eat or drink. De plus, you no longer require a tech focus to cast pouvoir techniques.
  • You are vulnerable to ion dégâts. De plus, you have disavantage on jet de sauvegardes against effects that would deal ion or lightning dégâts.
  • You can not sense the Force, use pouvoir de la Forces, or take niveaus in forcecasting classes.
  • You are no longer a valid target for cybernetic augmentations or genetic mutations. However, you are now a valid target for droid customizations.

Adaptable Fading.name: Fondu adaptable
Adaptable Fading.description:
You can easily overthrow an enemy's fortitude. You gain the following benefits:

  • Increase your Strength or Constitution score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
  • When you make an attack roll using your Strength, vous pouvez choisir to add half your Constitution modificateur to the attack roll. Alternatively, when you would make an attack roll using Constitution, you can add half your Strength modificateur to the attack roll. You can use this feature un nombre de fois égal à your bonus de maîtrise. Vous regagnez tous expended uses of this feature when you complete a repos long.
  • When an effect you control would call for a Strength jet de sauvegarde, you can instead have it call for a Constitution jet de sauvegarde. Alternatively, when an effect you control would call for a Constitution jet de sauvegarde, you can instead have it call for a Strength jet de sauvegarde. You can use this feature un nombre de fois égal à your bonus de maîtrise. Vous regagnez tous expended uses of this feature when you complete a repos long.
